title: MetCon conversions
content:
**Rogue Echo Bike (metres to miles):**
1000 metres = 0.62 miles
2000 metres = 1.24 miles
4000 metres = 2.48 miles

**Rogue Echo Bike (miles to metres):**
1 mile = 1609 metres
2 miles = 3218 metres
3 miles = 4828 metres

_All estimates are for average athletes_

**Rower**
10 calories Row = 7 calories on the Rogue Echo Bike.
10 calories row takes an average athlete 36 seconds
10 Rowing Calories is equivalent to 166 meters rowed.
500 metres takes an average athlete 2 minutes
100M row takes 24 seconds. (4 mins per 1000m)
Rowing 100M burns about 6 calories

**Echo Bike**
7 Calories on the Echo Bike is about 0.22 miles (354 metres)
1600 metres/1 mile takes approx. 3 mins
Biking 0.13 miles (200 metres) burns about 4.2 calories.

**Row - Airbike Conversion**
100 meters Row = 0.13 miles (200 metres) on the Rogue Echo Bike.
10 Calories Rower = 7 Calories Echo Bike
1000 Meters Row = 1.3 Miles (2092 metres) on Echo Bike

**Approx run-row conversions:**
1 mile run (1600 metres) = 2000 metres Row = 2.6 miles (4184 metres)
1/2 mile run (800 metres = 1000 metres Row = 1.3 miles (2092 metres)
1/4 mile run (400 metres = 500 metres Row = 0.64 miles (1046 metres)
